CVE-2019-10203.title: PowerDNS Authoritative daemon , pdns versions 4.0.x before 4.0.9, ...
CVE-2019-10203.summary: PowerDNS Authoritative daemon , pdns versions 4.0.x before 4.0.9, 4.1.x before 4.1.11, exiting when encountering a serial between 2^31 and 2^32-1 while trying to notify a slave leads to DoS.

CVE-2020-17482.title: An issue has been found in PowerDNS Authoritative Server before 4 ...
CVE-2020-17482.summary: An issue has been found in PowerDNS Authoritative Server before 4.3.1 where an authorized user with the ability to insert crafted records into a zone might be able to leak the content of uninitialized memory.

CVE-2022-27227.title: In PowerDNS Authoritative Server before 4.4.3, 4.5.x before 4.5.4 ...
CVE-2022-27227.summary: In PowerDNS Authoritative Server before 4.4.3, 4.5.x before 4.5.4, and 4.6.x before 4.6.1 and PowerDNS Recursor before 4.4.8, 4.5.x before 4.5.8, and 4.6.x before 4.6.1, insufficient validation of an IXFR end condition causes incomplete zone transfers to be handled as successful transfers.

CVE-2022-27227.title: In PowerDNS Authoritative Server before 4.4.3, 4.5.x before 4.5.4 ...
CVE-2022-27227.summary: In PowerDNS Authoritative Server before 4.4.3, 4.5.x before 4.5.4, and 4.6.x before 4.6.1 and PowerDNS Recursor before 4.4.8, 4.5.x before 4.5.8, and 4.6.x before 4.6.1, insufficient validation of an IXFR end condition causes incomplete zone transfers to be handled as successful transfers.
